prompt: Create a dreamy ultra-bright fantasy fashion portrait in a vertical 2:3 composition, photographed from very close range with shallow depth of field and heavy golden backlight. The subject is a young woman in ornate fairy-like hanfu-inspired styling, reclining or turned sideways so her head and shoulder fill the upper half of the frame; place a large opaque square censor block over the center-left face area, colored muted peach-beige, covering most facial features. She has dark brown hair arranged in an elaborate updo, decorated with exactly 5 visible categories of ornaments: large white blossoms, tiny gold leaf flakes, dangling pearl strands, fine gold chains, and sparkling crystal beads. Her outfit is a translucent pastel gown in lavender pink with iridescent organza layers, a bow-like shoulder detail, gold embroidery flecks, and soft blue-pink highlights. Surround her with abundant oversized foreground flowers and petals in cream, peach, pale yellow, and light blue, plus glossy green lotus-like leaves at the bottom right. In the background, show exactly 2 golden paper parasols, one large parasol in the upper right and one partial parasol near the top center, both blurred into radiant bokeh. The style should feel like ethereal Chinese fantasy editorial photography: high exposure, sun-drenched haze, glittering highlights, lens bloom, pastel color grading, macro floral foreground blur, luxurious jewelry detail, romantic overexposed summer atmosphere, no readable text, no watermark.
